examples: How was I to know Argentina used those quirkily angled three-pronged plugs?
The story of cryptography as told in The Code Book is packed with quirkily brilliant characters.
The Sony tablet entrants are good-looking and quirkily designed, although one fears for any tablet going up against the iPad.
The hyper troupe makes a manic attempt to perform 30 plays in 60 minutes, and admission cost is quirkily-based on the throw of a dice.
